summary: Comprehensive site-wide QA pass for LEXA Lifestyle website completed. 15/16 backend API tests passed. All major pages tested including Homepage, Solutions, Services, Projects, Blog, Packages, Catalogues, Contact, Brands, Experience Centre, and Admin. Dark mode toggle, mobile responsiveness, and Quick View modals all working correctly. Footer now displays all 6 social icons as expected.

minor.issue: Returns {packages: [...]} instead of flat array - not a bug, just different structure than other list endpoints

issues: Article title has slightly low contrast against dark gradient background - text is dark gray on dark background. Consider adding text shadow or lighter text color for titles in hero section

context_for_next_testing_agent: All previous iteration 77 issues have been fixed: Footer now shows all 6 social icons (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, X/Twitter), Catalogues page has proper pt-24 padding. The site uses dark mode by default with a working theme toggle. Cookie consent popup appears on first visit. Admin dashboard has 106 Solutions, 19 Projects, 53 Articles, 37 Brands.

verified_features.notes: Hero, Trust Badges, Solutions Bento Grid, Calculator Cards, Projects Gallery, Testimonials, Stats, Experience Centre CTA all rendering
81 solution links, categories organized, links working
19 projects, 19 Quick View buttons, modal opens correctly
106 articles, category filters working, Quick View available
Author 'LEXA Team' displaying correctly with date and read time
Property type cards loading, tier links to /package-builder found, developer packages visible
pt-24 padding correct, category filters working, 9 catalogue cards visible
Google Maps iframe loading, contact form with all fields visible
54 brand links, category filters, search bar available
Hero with booking CTAs, location info, opening hours, feature cards
All nav links visible (Solutions, Services, Intelligence, Packages, Brands, Projects, Catalogues, Experience), dropdowns working, Book Consultation button visible
All 6 icons present: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, X/Twitter. Copyright shows 2026.
Toggle switches between dark/light mode, icon changes from moon to sun
Homepage, Packages, Contact pages all render correctly on mobile. Hamburger menu works, bottom nav bar visible.
Login form works, redirects to dashboard with stats (106 Solutions, 19 Projects, 53 Articles, 37 Brands, 46 Consultations)
